description.value:
Prerequisite: Must not be immune to fear.

Benefit: You have a -6 penalty on all saves against fear effects. Even if you succeed on such a save, you are still shaken for 1 round.

Special: If the effect would normally leave you shaken on a successful save, you become frightened instead. If the effect would normally leave you frightened on a successful save, you become panicked. This flaw overrides any class features, should they come into conflict.

Gain: Taking this flaw grants you one bonus feat.
